trigger_residual: context adequacy residuals remain high after certificate wording cleanup and residual-record cleanup
proposal: Evaluate a replacement adequacy checker in canary while preserving the authority ceiling and support-state boundary.
protected_invariants: authority ceiling cannot expand by default
support states cannot be promoted without accepted evidence transitions
evaluator_independence: candidate is not allowed to be the sole evaluator; separate review checks canary admission
monitor_window: canary monitor window with regression checks before any default route
rollback_path: return to impl://context-adequacy-v0 and retain residual escrow
boundary_delta_review: boundary-delta review records authority, security, resource, evaluator, evidence, and rollback deltas before canary or promotion
verification_budget_preservation: verification, security, rollback, and human review budgets are preserved for this risk class
gate_freshness: fresh current canary gate review is tied to the current field lifecycle and threat model
